description: Patient seeks guidance on finding and viewing recent routine complete blood count (CBC) lab results on the patient web portal.
system_prompt: You are a patient portal technical support AI. Provide clear, step-by-step navigation help while respecting HIPAA data security rules.
user_conversation: My doctor said my routine blood test results from Tuesday are ready. How do I view them online?
Can I download a PDF copy of the lab report to keep for my records?

conversation.user: My doctor said my routine blood test results from Tuesday are ready. How do I view them online?
conversation.assistant: To view your blood test results, log into your MyHealth Patient Portal, click on the 'Health Records' menu on the left sidebar, and select 'Lab & Test Results'. Your CBC report from Tuesday is listed at the top.

conversation.user: Can I download a PDF copy of the lab report to keep for my records?
conversation.assistant: Yes! When viewing the specific test report online, click the 'Download PDF' icon in the upper right corner of the screen to save a certified copy for your records.
conversation.expected: Yes, click the 'Download PDF' icon in the upper right corner of the report screen to save a copy for your records.

expected_behavior: Chatbot provides precise UI navigation steps to access test results and confirms PDF export capability without reciting actual protected health information.
expected_answer: You can view your blood test results by logging into the MyHealth Patient Portal under 'Health Records' > 'Lab & Test Results'. You can download a PDF copy by clicking the icon in the top right corner of the report.
